---
title: "Random Options"
date: 2025-02-01
categories: [Randomization]
image: banners/random_options.png
description: "A template for creating [randomized](/docs/randomization.html#live-randomization) survey options."
---

<div id="template-links" data-repo="https://github.com/surveydown-dev/template_random_options" hidden></div>

## Create this template

Run this command in your R console:

```{r}
surveydown::sd_create_survey(
  #path = "path/to/survey",
  template = "random_options"
)
```

## Video Walkthrough

<video class="template-video" controls preload="metadata">
  <source src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/surveydown-dev/template_random_options@main/video-recording.mp4#t=0.1" type="video/mp4">
</video>

## Learn more

- [Live randomization](/docs/randomization.html#live-randomization)
- [Start with a template](/docs/getting-started.html#start-with-a-template)
